description: A designed card on a plain white background reproducing a Donald Trump social-media post. Standard layout: circular American-flag-painted avatar at top-left, bold name 'Donald J. Trump' with magenta verification badge and a dark subscription badge, handle '@realDonaldTrump' beneath. Body text in black sans-serif reads: 'The Chancellor of Germany, Friedrich Merz, thinks it’s OK for Iran to have a Nuclear Weapon. He doesn’t know what he’s talking about! If Iran had a Nuclear Weapon, the whole World would be held hostage. I am doing something with Iran, right now, that other Nations, or Presidents, should have done long ago. No wonder Germany is doing so poorly, both Economically, and otherwise! President DONALD J. TRUMP'. The card repackages a presidential statement attacking Germany's chancellor and asserting U.S. leadership against Iran's nuclear program. Propaganda technique is belittling a foreign leader/ally while positioning Trump as the decisive actor; shared via the Press Secretary account (RT of @RapidResponse47). Target audience is the general public and foreign-policy watchers.
notable_text: 'The Chancellor of Germany, Friedrich Merz, thinks it’s OK for Iran to have a Nuclear Weapon. He doesn’t know what he’s talking about! ... No wonder Germany is doing so poorly, both Economically, and otherwise!'
